en: No, you didn't. No, you didn't, Mama. Madam, your seat.
Well, thank you. But, wait, is it my birthday?
No, Mama. You all look so pretty.
Mama, what's going on? Good evening, Catherine.
So, you're not gonna say anything? It's not my place.
Are you evil? Okay, well, I'm not gonna do this all night.
Oh, mother of mercy. That's for me.
Are you sad, Mama? No. It's okay, Mama.
He's a good man. I know. I know.
I just can't help it. He hasn't even asked you yet.
